properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 122/18

1.    EXERCISE TRIDENT JUNCTURE 2018 IS A MAJOR MULTINATIONAL NATO EXERCISE INVOLVING SHIPS, SUBMARINES, AND AIRCRAFT. THE EXERCISEWILL TAKE PLACE FROM 25 OCTOBER TO 7 NOVEMBER 2018 IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A.    70-00 N 020-00 W
B.    70-00 N 015-00 E
C.    60-00 N 015-00 E
D.    60-00 N 020-00 W

2.    MILITARY UNITS MAY NAVIGATE AND MANOEUVRE IRREGULARLY AND WITHOUT NAVIGATIONAL LIGHTS OR AIS.

3.POINTS OF CONTACT DURING THE EXERCISE: 

NATO SHIPPING CENTRE
PHONE: +44 1923 956574
EMAIL: INFO@SHIPPING.NATO.INT

4. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE ON 072359 UTC NOV18.
